behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all file paths tested, the MINIMAX_API_KEY env var, the api.minimax.io base URL, and the four model names (M2.7, M2.7-highspeed, M2.5, M2.5-highspeed) that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add (MiniMax provider across listed files) without specifying exact lines or code to write.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_safety_limits_minimax_default asserts distance < 50 chars between '"minimax"' and '"MiniMax-M2.7"' implying a specific match arm style; also test_minimax_has_four_models requires exact model name strings like 'MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed' which are plausible but the exact capitalization/naming is gold-specific and not uniquely derivable (though instruction lists them).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse TOML via tomllib, run cargo check/test/clippy/fmt/doc/build subprocesses, not just text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require adding actual provider entries with specific structure (e.g., context_length >= 200000, model_type 'llm', provider registration) which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover backend TOML, provider registration, safety limits, and frontend/docs files mentioned in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped by comment headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) with descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: TOML schema keys (type, api_base, api_key_env, enabled, capabilities.context_length, model_type) are specified implicitly via reference to existing providers/models.toml structure.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and env vars appear consistent (MINIMAX_API_KEY, models.toml, provider_types.rs).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to modify but doesn't point to specific lines; file localization is part of the task scope.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch diffs are localized additions (new TOML entries, new env var blocks, new table rows) not full-file rewrites.
